title: Savory Gooey Kenyan Beans Stir-fry
description: A light and savory dish featuring high-protein-friendly Kenyan beans combined with white vinegar for a unique twist on traditional recipes.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add tomato paste to the pan and stir well to combine with the onions and garlic.
Pour in white vinegar and cayenne pepper flakes. Stir quickly to prevent burning.
Add soaked and drained kidney beans to the mixture, then pour the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil over them.
Stir gently until all ingredients are combined evenly.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes or until the beans start to take on a gooey texture from the vinegar. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot with rice or naan bread.
